main.description: A single logged exposure (a shot). Works for film (references a roll + frame number) and digital (no roll). Optionally belongs to a shoot and links to a published photo by AT-URI. Everything except createdAt is optional so shots can be logged fast in the field.

shoot.description: Optional app.graycard.session.capture this exposure belongs to.

frameNumber.description: Position on the roll (film). Optional. Several exposures may share one frameNumber: that is a multiple exposure on a single physical frame.

multipleExposure.description: True when this exposure is one of several deliberately stacked on the same physical frame (double/multiple exposure). All sub-exposures of the frame carry this flag and share roll + frameNumber.

frameExposureIndex.description: 1-based order of this sub-exposure within a multiple-exposure frame (1 for the first).

aperture.description: Chosen f-number as shown on the dial, e.g. '5.6', '8', '3.4'.

shutterSpeed.description: Chosen shutter speed as shown, e.g. '1/500', '1s', 'B'.

focalLength.description: Focal length used in mm (for zoom lenses).

shotAtIso.description: Exposure index this frame was rated at, if it differs from the roll/stock speed.

photo.description: Optional photo (AT-URI) this exposure was scanned/published as, e.g. a social.grain.photo.

provenance.description: How this exposure's data was asserted — e.g. manually logged vs imported from EXIF.
